RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (GRANT MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION FREEZING BANK ACCOUNT AND PREVENTING FURTHER TRANSFER OF MISAPPROPRIATED FUNDS. BOND OF $1,000.00 REQUIRED) except that the bond has been waived. Stipulation & order signed in open court. (AJR/PB)
